mapper.select: SELECT n.id, n.room_id, n.recipient_id, n.actor_id, u.nickname AS actor_nickname, u.profile_image_url AS actor_profile_image_url, n.type, n.sub_type, n.reference_id, n.payload, n.is_read, n.created_at FROM notifications n LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = n.actor_id WHERE n.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications (room_id, recipient_id, actor_id, type, sub_type, reference_id, payload) SELECT #{roomId}, user_id, #{actorId}, #{type}, #{subType}, #{referenceId}, #{payload} FROM room_members WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND (#{actorId} IS NULL OR user_id != #{actorId})
INSERT INTO notifications (room_id, recipient_id, actor_id, type, sub_type, reference_id, payload) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{recipientId}, #{actorId}, #{type}, #{subType}, #{referenceId}, #{payload})
